meaning: International Herald Tribune<<国际先驱论坛报>>
examples: Negotiating the terms of the contract could be enough to secure the IHT relief.
Reuters and IHT compete with Dow Jones & Co., parent of The Wall Street Journal.
And now, FOR a limited time, you can subscribe to the IHT at substantial savings.
The Times and the Herald Tribune already run a unified website, with visitors to IHT.com automatically sent to an international home page for the Times.
